description: Replace the `for`-loop in `cross_validate()` with an `lapply()` call. The refactored function should collect fold results in a single `lapply(seq_len(config@cv_folds), function(k) { ... })` expression, assigning the result directly to `metric_rows`. The final `do.call(rbind, metric_rows)` and `colMeans()` lines remain unchanged. The refactored version must be semantically equivalent and produce the same numeric output given the same seed.
